content: About Us Learn Pricing Blog Contact Us CuTe App About Us Learn Pricing Blog Contact Us कर्मण्येवाधिकारस्ते मा फलेषु कदाचन। मा कर्मफलहेतुर्भूर्मा ते सङ्गोऽस्त्वकर्मणि॥ We make children love and enjoy the process of learning. Are you a School / Institute? YES NO For All Ages Curious Team Learning, The Ultimate Homeschooling Platform. "Every child learns their way... we teach that way." Is your child struggling to study or need help with academics? We are the place for you. Start Homeschooling Explore Structure Connect with the cosmos Sit with Self. Step away from the endless noise. We usually use screens to connect with people far away—but here, we meet to connect with ourselves. Add to Google Calendar Mon-Fri • 7 - 8 pm • Opens in Calendar Our Core Approach Building self-awareness through academics. We don't just teach to pass exams. We use Math, Science, and Coding as playgrounds for children to discover how they think, how they handle challenges, and how they learn best. A Complete Homeschooling Solution. Complete Academic Curriculum Full management of the core syllabus (Math, Sciences, Humanities) aligned with standard boards. We take the teaching burden off the parents while keeping you 100% in the loop. Future-Ready Skills Homeschooling isn't just about reading textbooks. We integrate practical courses in Coding, Critical Thinking, and Communication to prepare them for the modern world. Physical Hands-on Kits Online doesn't mean passive. We ship physical learning kits and practicals directly to your home so abstract theories become real-world knowledge they can touch and build. The Process How your child starts their journey with us. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all onboarding. Every student's journey is mapped specifically for them. 1 The Discovery Call We hop on a call with you to understand your child's current academic level, their struggles, and their unique learning style. 2 The Custom Blueprint Based on the call, we assign the perfect mentor and design a custom learning method that balances academics with future skills. 3 Learning Begins Live 1-on-1 sessions begin on the CuTe App. Practical learning kits are shipped directly to your home for hands-on application. Who Can Choose Us? Is your child struggling to study or need help with academics? We are the place for you. Families exploring homeschooling Parents who want to homeschool often worry about managing academics on their own. Curious Team Learning provides structured academic guidance so families can choose homeschooling with confidence. Families seeking a mindful, slow-paced approach Parents who wish to step away from traditional, high-pressure schooling culture can find a safe haven here. We believe that true learning happens naturally in a supportive environment rather than when it is forced. Families exploring better educational alternatives For families who feel the current education system isn't serving their child's best interests, we offer a comprehensive alternative. We provide better learning options that adapt entirely to your child's unique needs and potential. Students who feel overwhelmed by traditional schooling Some students struggle not because they lack ability, but because the pace and pressure of the school system can feel exhausting. A personalized learning environment can help them rebuild confidence and enjoy learning again. Students who learn differently Some children understand concepts better when they are taught in ways that match their learning style. With smaller learning groups and personalized attention, students get the time and guidance they need to truly understand what they are learning. Students experiencing academic burnout Constant exams, homework pressure, and competition can make learning feel stressful instead of meaningful. A more flexible learning approach allows children to learn deeply without feeling constantly overwhelmed. Students who need more personal attention In large classrooms, it can be difficult for teachers to focus on individual students. Smaller learning environments allow teachers to understand each child’s pace, strengths, and challenges. Students whose parents get transferred frequently When families move often due to work transfers, children may have to change schools repeatedly. This can disrupt their studies and make it hard to maintain consistency. A stable online learning environment helps ensure that their education continues smoothly, no matter where they move. Students who want time to explore their interests Some children are passionate about sports, art, music, coding, or other pursuits. A flexible learning structure allows them to balance academics while still having the time to explore what they love. Ready to start a mindful learning journey? Curious Team Learning is more than just an Ed-Tech company. We are a community dedicated to make Child-First, Supportive, Slow-paced, and Meaningful Learning Journey. Book a 5-Day Free Demo What Our Students Say Real stories from families who found peace and progress through our homeschooling platform. ★★★★★ "My journey with Curious Team Learning Pvt. Ltd. started during my Class 9th and 10th, where I was taught by Lavish Sharma. He personally guided me in Science, Mathematics, and Social Science, and focused on building my concepts rather than rote learning. His teaching methodology was based on simplifying complex topics and on encouraging logical thinking by deeply focusing on understanding the basics. This significantly improved my academic confidence and performance especially in one of the subjects that I feared the most, Maths. When I started pursuing my graduation, I continued my learning journey with Curious Team Learning by starting Graphic Designing & Video Editing. The project-based learning and hands – on training, helped me develop my creativity and problem-solving skills. Thank you Curious Team Learning for playing a significant role in shaping both my educational foundation and my creative journey." Ridam Mehrishi 3 months ago ★★★★★ "I had the opportunity to work with Curious Team Learning Pvt. Ltd., where I completed two internships (2 months + 3 months). During this time, I worked on exciting projects like a drone controller, robotic car, and a full-stack web platform under the guidance of experienced seniors. Their step-by-step guidance from basics to advanced skills really helped me grow, and because of this learning, I got placed in a software company in Jaipur where I’m currently working. If you’re a school or college student and feeling confused about skills or career direction, Curious Team Learning is a great place to start learning from scratch with proper mentorship." Gopesh Jangid 3 months ago ★★★★★ "I had opportunity to work with Lavish Boss (He is my senior) since 2024. Me and my team firstly create a "ROBO RACE BOAT" with help of Lavish Boss. After that we learnt many things by Boss like( programming skills, Embedded system, PCB designing ,IoT system etc ) . We took training of PCB designing. His teaching experience is very well. Also they organise the sessions for Art workshop know as (kruती ). Lavish Boss is very supportive and a polite person." DEVENDRA GEHLOT 2 months ago ★★★★★ "I had a great experience during my internship at this coaching institute. The mentors were very supportive and knowledgeable, and I learned a lot of practical skills. The environment was friendly and professional, which helped me grow both personally and professionally" Bharat Gorani 2 months ago ★★★★ "Today, I visited Curious Team Learning Private Limited for my IoT project, and I am really happy with the experience. The team was supportive and explained everything clearly. Great guidance and a very positive environment. Highly recommended." Dhruv Khandelwal 2 months ago Read all our reviews on Google Our Mission From Pressure to Passion Originating from Kota, Rajasthan, we've seen the toll of academic pressure. We are here to change the narrative. Empathy First We prioritize student's mental health. We listen more than we speak, creating a safe space to analyze actual problems instead of forcing rote learning & instructions. Connected Learning Subjects aren't silos. We show how Math connects to Art, and Science to History. This holistic view fosters genuine curiosity and understanding. 1-to-1 Attention Every child is unique. Our customized 1-on-1 sessions ensure that we adapt to the child's pace, turning them into imaginators, not just test-takers. Why take a 1 - year journey with us? We recommend a full year of mentorship to truly transform a student's perspective towards education. By integrating skill development with academics, we help them discover that education is a tool for life, not a burden. Lavish Sharma Disha Audichya The Vision Behind Our Universe Changing how a child’s growth is evaluated, not what is taught. "Since childhood, I have been deeply fascinated by the cosmos. Space represents limitless exploration, exactly how a child's mind operates before the pressure crushes it and I have been looking for a way to undo it ever since. Then I met Disha, we connected instantly over shared empathy for children. We saw students breaking down under academic pressure and chose to work on the problem through Codru Education, in 2021. By 2025, we realized: Children aren't failing because of a lack of ability. They are failing because the environment simply doesn't work for them. This is how Codru Education evolved into Curious Team Learning, where we worked to change the way, it is delivered. The academic syllabus did not need changes but how it is imparted needed to." Lavish Sharma Co-Founder & Educator Enter CuTeEs This platform is our Step One towards building a better future. My ultimate mission is to build our educational framework: the Curious Team Education System (CuTeEs). Here, children’s growth is defined by the problems they solve and by their unique learning journey. And yes, it is pronounced "cuties"—because that is exactly how we view every child who enters our universe. To protect this vision, Disha and I personally train every single mentor. When you and your child log in, you experience an empathetic community built by people who truly care. Homeschooling Structure We combine core academics with modern future skills. Everything your child needs to succeed outside the traditional system. Valid Certification We guide you through the process of obtaining valid board certifications as a homeschooler. Complete Academic Core (CBSE/ICSE) 1-on-1 • View Pricing Coding 3 Levels Robotics 3 Levels PCB Designing 3 Levels Graphic Designing 3 Levels Drawing 3 Levels Sketching 3 Levels Painting 3 Levels Calligraphy 3 Levels Pricing Choose the level of support that fits your family's needs. Access to CuTe Tools & Community 1 on 1 class (Upto 1:30 hour) Mentorship & Guidance Performance Report Collaborative Learning Know More Best Value 1 on 1 Complete Homeschooling Bundle All Subjects + Skills ₹54,000 ₹30,000 /mo 2 Months Free! Access to CuTe Tools & Community 1 on 1 class (Up to 3 hours class) Multiple Mentors & Experts Collaborative Learning Overall Performance Report Skill Development Courses Practical Hands-on Kits Know More Need a Custom Plan? Every child's learning pace and interests are different. Whether you need a specific combination of subjects, flexible timings for an athlete, or a hybrid approach, we can build a schedule that fits your exact requirements. Talk to an Expert Got Questions? Frequently Asked Questions Do I have to teach the subjects myself? No! That is the biggest benefit of our platform. We provide expert, 1-on-1 mentors to handle all the actual teaching, curriculum planning, and doubt-solving. Your role is simply to be a supportive parent, not a stressed-out teacher. How will my child get valid certifications or give board exams? We align our curriculum perfectly with standard boards (like CBSE/ICSE/NIOS). We guide parents through the process of registering their children as private candidates so they can legally sit for their 10th and 12th board exams and receive government-recognized certificates, exactly like regular school students. What about socialization? Won't my child be lonely? This is a common myth. Homeschooled children actually have more time to socialize in real-world settings (sports clubs, art classes, community groups) because they aren't trapped at a desk for 8 hours a day. Furthermore, our platform includes "Collaborative Learning" group projects where they interact directly with their peers in a safe, moderated environment. Do you teach the regular school syllabus (CBSE/ICSE)? Yes! We align our academic teaching with your child's specific school board (CBSE, ICSE, or State Boards). Our goal is to help them master their current school subjects so they can perform better in their actual exams, but we do it without the traditional pressure. Is this a replacement for regular school? It can be either! For most students, we act as a complete, premium after-school support system (replacing crowded tuitions). However, for families choosing homeschooling, our Alternative Education Program provides everything needed to structure their entire academic year. What are the "Practical Learning Home Kits"? Depending on the program you choose, we physically ship educational kits to your doorstep. These include robotics components, science experiment materials, and logic puzzles that students use during their live sessions to build things with their own hands. What if my child misses a 1-on-1 session? Because our focus is entirely on your child's pace, a missed class simply means we pick up exactly where we left off next time. There is no "falling behind" the rest of the batch, and sessions can be rescheduled with prior notice. Since classes are online, isn't this just adding more screen time? We completely understand this concern. We differentiate between passive screen time (watching videos) and active screen time (building and interacting). Because we ship physical learning kits to your home, a large portion of the class involves your child looking down at their desk, using their hands to build circuits, solve physical puzzles, or conduct experiments while the mentor guides them live. If there is "no pressure," how will my child stay motivated to score good marks? Traditional pressure creates fear, which leads to rote memorization and eventual burnout. We replace pressure with passion. When a child actually understands the "why" behind a math formula or a science concept through practical application, intrinsic motivation takes over. They start studying because they are genuinely curious, which naturally leads to better retention and higher marks. Who are the mentors teaching my child? Our mentors are not just subject-matter experts; they are empathetic educators specifically trained for the 7-14 age group. Before teaching a single academic concept, their primary goal is to build a safe, judgment-free bond with your child so the student feels completely comfortable making mistakes and asking questions. As a parent, how involved do I need to be in these daily sessions? Our goal is to take the academic friction out of your relationship with your child. You do not need to sit with them during the sessions or force them to do homework. We handle the academics entirely. However, we keep you 100% in the loop through detailed performance reports and regular parent-mentor meetings to discuss their holistic growth. How does the group class work? Will my child get enough attention? Unlike crowded tuition centers, our group sessions are strictly capped at a maximum of 5 students. This ensures that every single child gets personal attention while also benefiting from collaborative learning—hearing questions their peers ask and developing social communication skills in a safe environment. Still have questions about Homeschooling? Chat with us on WhatsApp Curious Team Learning Private Limited. A Support System to Nurture Every Child.
